appSubtitle: AI dataset intelligence with anomaly signals, forecasting, and actionable insights.
loadingSummary: Generating premium insights, KPIs, and smart recommendations.
heroTitle: Enterprise-grade analytics with clarity and speed.
heroText: Upload a CSV, discover top opportunities, and share premium insights with your team.
businessAdvisorTooltip: Get free AI-powered business insights, KPIs, and recommendations
uploadCsvTitle: Upload a dataset to get started
filePrompt: Drag and drop or browse for a CSV, XLSX, or JSON file.
dataHealthText: Visual quality score with missing, duplicate, and clean breakdowns.
anomalySubtitle: Spikes and drops highlighted by AI
technicalSnapshotText: Deep data quality and distribution metrics
uploadFirstDatasetText: Submit a CSV to generate intelligent insights, quality analysis, and prioritized recommendations.
noChartsFilter: No charts found for this filter.
filterFallbackText: Displaying all available visualizations for this dataset so you can keep exploring.
noVisualizations: No visualizations are available for this dataset yet.
noVisualizationDataText: Upload a CSV and come back to explore charts and trend analysis.
askSubtitle: Natural language questions about your dataset
askHint: Try questions like "Which product is least performing?", "What is the top category?", or "Show duplicate rows."
askAfterUpload: Ask your data once you upload
askAfterUploadText: Upload a dataset to enable natural language questions and instant answers.
reportGeneratingText: Preparing your Data Mantri summary and download.
reportReadyText: Use the button below to print or save this report as PDF.
footerText: Data Mantri - smart dataset monitoring, anomaly alerts, and easy sharing for AI-powered teams.
initialStory: Upload a dataset to receive an AI analyst summary.
forecastReady: Forecasting is ready once a dataset contains time-based numeric trends.
questionFailed: Could not process your question. Please try again.
analystSignal: This is a high-confidence data signal for analysts.
modeSummaryEli5: Plain-language insights for fast understanding and easy decision-making.
modeSummaryBusiness: Executive-grade narratives, impact metrics, and action-ready recommendations.
modeSummaryData: Technical profiling, distribution patterns, correlations, and analyst-ready quality signals.
upgradeText: Your free trial has ended. Upgrade to Premium for auto-cleaning, forecasting, anomaly detection, recommendations, unlimited chatbot, PDF reports, and advanced filters.
cleanDataFailed: Could not clean this dataset. Please try again.
cleaningPerfectNote: Cleaned data is now analysis-ready with no missing values left.
chatbotLimitReached: Basic chatbot limit reached. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited questions.
upgradeFailed: Could not upgrade your plan. Please try again.
voiceIdle: Tap the mic and ask in English
voiceSubtitle: Ask naturally in English. Your CSV stays analyzed on the server.
voiceNoData: Upload and analyze a CSV first, then the advisor can answer from your real data.
voiceNoSupport: Voice input needs Chrome or Edge. You can still type in Ask Your Data.
auth_subtitle: Premium analytics built to answer every dataset question.
auth_loginError: Could not complete this request. Please try again.
auth_otpSent: Enter the OTP sent to your email.
auth_passwordTooShort: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
auth_resetInstructions: Enter the email for your account and we will send a secure reset link.
auth_linkReady: Open the reset link from your email to create a new password.
